name: Reese's Chewy Chocolate Pan Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Butter or margarine (softened) - equivalent to 2 1/2 sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 15.5 x 10.5 x 1-inch jelly-roll pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs and vanilla; mix well.
5. Stir together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in another bowl.
6. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
7. Stir in the Reese's peanut butter chips.
8. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until set.
10. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Cut into bars.
Makes about 4 dozen bars.
